catastrophic_threshold: Any action affecting business data, credentials, or production systems
evidence_required: Test results, validation logs, governance review
completion_condition: Human Administrator confirms work completed and approves next phase
governor_role: Interpret human direction, create work orders, review evidence, guide Claude Executor
executor_role: Execute work orders, produce evidence, respect governance boundaries, report findings
human_role: Set strategic direction, approve catastrophic actions, review governance decisions, authorize phase transitions
